titles.title: God, I’m Not Okay but I’m Still Here

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I smile when I’m breaking Stay strong when I’m weak Say “I’m fine” through the aching Hide tears no one sees But You’ve been there in the silence Where no spotlight ever shone You see the fight I never mentioned And You still call me Your own

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God, I’m not okay but I’m still here Holding on through every quiet tear When the world moves on, You stay near You don’t need me to pretend You just sit with me again God, I’m not okay… but I’m still here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I show up when I’m empty Sing songs when I’m numb Try praying when the words Just don’t seem to come But You’re not looking for perfection Just my barely-holding-on You’re the Shepherd in my questions The strength when I am gone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God, I’m not okay but I’m still here Breathing through the doubt and hidden fear You don’t need my polished prayer You just need my quiet heart You’ve loved me from the start God, I’m not okay… but I’m still here

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If all I bring is brokenness That’s enough for You You never left my side You never needed proof

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God, I’m not okay but I’m still here And somehow You still draw me near You’re the hope I cling to in my tears You don’t ask me to be fine You just whisper: “You are mine” God, I’m not okay… but I’m still here
